hypothesis: If aromatic valency is computed correctly using an aromatic-aware lookup or Kekulized GEOM-Drugs and unstable molecules are filtered, then 3D molecule generation models retrained on this corrected dataset will produce molecules with fewer valency violations and lower GFN2-xTB Δr, Δθ, Δφ, and ΔE_relax than the same models trained on the original dataset, because removing aromatic-bond ambiguity and unstable targets prevents systematic errors in training and evaluation.
